hero.headline: JAIN Online MBA in AI for Human Resources: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) Online MBA with an AI for Human Resources specialisation. NIRF #62 University, NAAC A++, UGC-DEB approved. AI for Recruitment and Onboarding Automation, Performance and Engagement Measurement using AI, Predictive HR Analytics, Diversity and Inclusion Prediction Models, Smart Talent Development, and AI-Enabled Leadership in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: JAIN Online MBA AI for HR: NIRF #62, NAAC A++, fees Rs 1.75L-1.96L (3 payment options), 4 scholarship categories. AI-HR convergence curriculum with AI Recruitment Automation, Performance AI, Predictive HR Analytics, Diversity Prediction Models, Smart Talent Development, and AI-Enabled Leadership. Most AI-forward HR MBA in JAIN's portfolio for HRBP and HR Tech roles.

about.body:
The JAIN Online MBA in AI for Human Resources is offered by JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Bengaluru. JAIN holds NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #62 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #73 in Management. The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The AI for Human Resources specialisation delivers a distinctly different curriculum from JAIN's standard HRM spec. Sem 3 covers Strategic Management in the AI Era, AI for Recruitment and Onboarding Automation, Performance and Engagement Measurement using AI, Psychology of Leadership, Design Thinking and Product Development, Business Law in the Digital Age, Business Research Methods, and AI for Business Decision Making. Sem 4 delivers Predictive Human Resource Analytics, Diversity, Inclusion and Retention Prediction Models, AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management, Smart Talent Development and Learning Systems, Emerging Tech in Business, and Research / Project.

This is the only JAIN MBA specialisation with dedicated AI for recruitment automation, predictive HR analytics with a focus on diversity and inclusion prediction, and smart learning systems as standalone subjects. HR professionals at IT services companies and MNCs who need to lead AI-driven people operations transformation will find this curriculum directly aligned to the emerging CHRO and People Analytics Head profile.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management in the AI Era
sem3Subjects.description: Evaluate AI workforce disruption, design AI-enabled HR strategy, and develop workforce planning models for AI-transformed organisations.

sem3Subjects.name: AI for Recruitment and Onboarding Automation
sem3Subjects.description: Deploy AI-driven applicant tracking, design automated screening and shortlisting pipelines, and implement digital onboarding systems.

sem3Subjects.name: Performance and Engagement Measurement using AI
sem3Subjects.description: Build AI-powered performance dashboards, apply sentiment analysis to employee engagement data, and automate performance review analytics.

sem3Subjects.name: Psychology of Leadership
sem3Subjects.description: Apply behavioural psychology and emotional intelligence frameworks to lead AI-assisted people management and HR transformation.

sem3Subjects.name: Design Thinking and Product Development
sem3Subjects.description: Apply design thinking to HR product design, employee experience innovation, and AI-augmented HR process redesign.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Law in the Digital Age
sem3Subjects.description: Apply digital employment law, DPDP Act compliance, and AI ethics frameworks to HR data governance and workforce monitoring.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Research Methods
sem3Subjects.description: Design workforce research studies, conduct employee surveys, and apply statistical analysis to HR analytics and people data projects.

sem3Subjects.name: AI for Business Decision Making
sem3Subjects.description: Apply GenAI tools to HR decision support, RPA in HR operations, and AI frameworks for talent and workforce planning decisions.

sem4Subjects.name: Predictive Human Resource Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Build attrition prediction models, apply workforce demand forecasting, and develop HR KPI dashboards for people analytics roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Diversity, Inclusion and Retention Prediction Models
sem4Subjects.description: Apply ML models to diversity gap analysis, build inclusion measurement frameworks, and design AI-assisted retention prediction systems.

sem4Subjects.name: AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management
sem4Subjects.description: Lead AI adoption in HR functions, manage digital people operations transformation, and build responsible AI governance for HR systems.

sem4Subjects.name: Smart Talent Development and Learning Systems
sem4Subjects.description: Design AI-personalised learning programmes, implement intelligent LMS platforms, and manage predictive skill gap identification systems.

sem4Subjects.name: Emerging Tech in Business
sem4Subjects.description: Evaluate AI, IoT, and digital twin applications for workforce management, smart workplace design, and HR operations innovation.

sem4Subjects.name: Research / Project (Earn While You Learn)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied AI in HR project on attrition prediction, AI recruitment pipeline design, or inclusive talent analytics system.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all JAIN MBA specialisations. See the main JAIN Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
AI for HR MBA graduates from JAIN Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT services and product companies, BFSI HR technology, Consulting people advisory, EdTech HR, FMCG HR analytics, Staffing and talent technology

**Entry-level roles:** HR Technology Analyst, People Analytics Analyst, Talent Acquisition Tech Analyst, HRIS Analyst, L&D Technology Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** People Analytics Manager, HR Technology Manager, Talent Intelligence Manager, AI Recruitment Lead, HR Transformation Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CHRO (Digital), Head of People Analytics, VP HR Technology, Director Talent Intelligence, Chief People Officer

**Top hiring organisations:** Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Accenture India, IBM India HR, Amazon India People, Flipkart HR, Deloitte HR Consulting, KPMG People Advisory, ManpowerGroup, Randstad India, Workday India, SAP SuccessFactors India, Oracle HCM India

skills.body:
The JAIN AI for HR specialisation builds skills that HR technology and people analytics employers test at HRBP and HR manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- AI for Recruitment and Onboarding Automation: AI-driven screening pipeline design, automated candidate shortlisting, and digital onboarding system management for talent acquisition technology roles
- Predictive Human Resource Analytics: attrition prediction modelling, workforce demand forecasting, and HR KPI dashboard development for people analytics roles
- Performance and Engagement Measurement using AI: AI-powered performance dashboard design, sentiment analysis on employee engagement data, and automated performance review analytics for HRBP roles
- Diversity, Inclusion and Retention Prediction Models: ML-assisted diversity gap analysis, inclusion measurement framework design, and retention risk modelling for D&I and people analytics

**Applied skills:**
- Smart Talent Development and Learning Systems: AI-personalised LMS platform management, predictive skill gap identification, and intelligent learning programme design for L&D transformation roles
- AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management: HR AI governance, responsible AI in people operations, and HR technology transformation leadership

**Soft skills:** Presenting people analytics insights to CHRO and board, managing HR technology vendor evaluations, communicating AI-driven performance decisions to employees, and leading responsible AI adoption in people operations.

comparisons.body:
Comparing JAIN Online MBA AI for HR against peers:

**vs JAIN HRM (standard) within the same university:** JAIN HRM covers talent acquisition, L&D, industrial relations, labour laws, employee negotiation, and performance management through traditional HR frameworks. JAIN AI for HR replaces traditional HR subjects with AI-augmented versions: AI recruitment automation, predictive HR analytics, diversity prediction models, and smart learning systems. Students targeting AI-driven people operations should choose AI for HR. Students targeting traditional IT sector HR, labour law compliance, and HRBP roles should choose standard HRM.

**vs LPU Online MBA HRM:** LPU HRM includes a dedicated HR Analytics subject at Rs 1,61,600 with zero-cost EMI. JAIN AI for HR goes further with dedicated Predictive HR Analytics, Diversity and Inclusion Prediction Models, AI Recruitment Automation, and Smart Talent Development as full standalone subjects - a significantly deeper AI-HR curriculum than LPU's single analytics subject.

**vs Amity Online MBA HRM:** Amity HRM at Rs 2,25,000 covers traditional HR management without dedicated AI-HR subjects. JAIN AI for HR's recruitment automation, predictive analytics, and D&I prediction model coverage is unique in the online MBA market at this fee range.

fees.body:
The JAIN Online MBA in AI for Human Resources is priced between Rs 1,75,000 and Rs 1,96,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year program). JAIN offers different fee tiers based on specialisation - contact our counsellor for exact fee for this specific specialisation.

**Payment options (3 ways)**:

- **Semester-wise**: Rs 43,750 per semester (Tier 1) or Rs 49,000 per semester (Tier 2)
- **Yearly**: Rs 87,500 per year (Tier 1) or Rs 98,000 per year (Tier 2)
- **One-time upfront**: Rs 1,75,000 (Tier 1) or Rs 1,96,000 (Tier 2)

**Additional charges (Indian students)**:
- Registration fee: Rs 2,500 one-time
- Examination fee: Rs 3,000 per year (Rs 6,000 total for 2 years)

**Total effective cost (Indian student)**:
- Tier 1 specs: Rs 1,83,500
- Tier 2 specs: Rs 2,04,500

**International student fees**:
- SAARC countries: additional Rs 11,250 registration + Rs 3,750 per year exam fee
- Other international students: USD 150 registration + USD 50 per year exam fee

**EMI options**: Available through JAIN's direct NBFC lending partner tie-ups (same pattern as LPU and MUJ - not through external marketing partners). Contact our counsellor for current EMI tenure options, approval terms, and whether zero-cost or interest-bearing.

**Scholarships available** (4 categories - specific discount % and eligibility varies by admission cycle):
- **Merit-based**: Academic excellence scholarship for qualifying marks
- **Armed Forces**: Support for serving/veteran military personnel and families
- **Gender-focused**: Empowerment scholarship for diverse applicants
- **Freshers**: Transition support for recent undergraduates

Specific discount percentages are confirmed at admission based on eligibility. Contact our counsellor for current cycle scholarship details.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with JAIN each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees, scholarship eligibility, and EMI terms with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) and carries the JAIN name with the MBA designation. The AI for Human Resources specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from JAIN Online MBA AI for HR alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Deepika Rajan
items.liked: AI for Recruitment and Onboarding Automation was directly applicable to my TA tech role at a Bengaluru IT company. Predictive HR Analytics helped me build attrition dashboards that became a key HR leadership tool.
items.disliked: Business Law in the Digital Age could be more India-specific regarding DPDP Act implications for HR data management.
items.body: I had 5 years in HR operations and wanted to move into people analytics. The JAIN AI for HR MBA was the only programme I found with dedicated AI recruitment and predictive analytics subjects. JAIN brand helped in Bengaluru IT sector hiring.

items.name: Sujith Ramachandran
items.liked: Smart Talent Development and Learning Systems was unique - no other online MBA had AI-personalised LMS design as a subject. Diversity Prediction Models was forward-looking.
items.disliked: 8 subjects in Sem 3 is heavy. Pacing could be better distributed across the 2 semesters.
items.body: Strong AI-HR curriculum for South India IT companies. Hyderabad IT firms recognised the AI HR credential well. For traditional HR roles without an AI transformation focus, standard JAIN HRM or LPU HRM offers more grounded people management depth.

items.name: Neethu Krishnan
items.liked: Predictive HR Analytics and AI-Enabled Leadership subjects were directly useful for my HR consulting work.
items.disliked: JAIN brand recognition outside Karnataka is weaker. In Kerala, self-sourcing for HR technology roles was necessary.
items.body: Strong curriculum for AI HR roles. Best suited for professionals at Bengaluru or Hyderabad IT companies where JAIN brand is recognised. For Kerala-based careers, JAIN HR credential may need to be supplemented with additional HR technology certifications.

faqs.question: How are JAIN fees different for different specializations?
faqs.answer: JAIN offers two pricing tiers across its MBA specialisations. Tier 1 is Rs 1,75,000 total (plus Rs 2,500 registration and Rs 6,000 examination fees). Tier 2 is Rs 1,96,000 total (same additional charges). The tier applicable to the AI for Human Resources specialisation should be confirmed with our counsellor as tier assignment can change across admission cycles.

faqs.question: What scholarships does JAIN offer for Online MBA?
faqs.answer: JAIN offers 4 scholarship categories: Merit-based (academic excellence), Armed Forces (military personnel and families), Gender-focused (diversity empowerment), and Freshers (recent graduates). Specific discount percentages and eligibility conditions are confirmed at admission and vary by intake cycle. Contact our counsellor for current cycle details.

faqs.question: Does JAIN offer dual specialization in Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. For HR-focused students, JAIN offers HR and Business Analytics (dual) and HRM and Finance (dual) as dedicated dual-spec programmes. Students wanting AI HR depth combined with analytics credentials can consider HR and Business Analytics as an alternative to AI for HR.

faqs.question: What is the difference between JAIN AI for HR and JAIN HRM?
faqs.answer: JAIN HRM covers talent acquisition, L&D, industrial relations and labour laws, employee negotiation skills, international HRM, and performance management through traditional HR frameworks. JAIN AI for HR covers AI-augmented HR: recruitment automation, predictive HR analytics, diversity prediction models, and smart learning systems. Students targeting people analytics and HR technology transformation should choose AI for HR.

faqs.question: Is JAIN AI for HR MBA suitable for IT company HR professionals?
faqs.answer: Yes. AI for Recruitment and Onboarding Automation, Predictive HR Analytics, and Performance and Engagement Measurement using AI are directly applicable to IT services HR tech roles. JAIN's Bengaluru base provides access to South India's large IT sector HR technology hiring market where these skills are increasingly required.

chooseIf: You are an HR professional targeting people analytics, AI recruitment technology, or HR transformation roles at IT services or MNC companies.
You want dedicated AI Recruitment Automation, Predictive HR Analytics, Diversity Prediction Models, and Smart Learning Systems subjects in one MBA.
You want 3 flexible payment options and 4 scholarship categories at fees of Rs 1.75L-1.96L.
consider: If traditional HRBP, labour law compliance, and IT sector HR management without AI focus is the target, JAIN's standard HRM specialisation provides more traditional people management depth.
If HR analytics combined with analytics domain depth is the goal, JAIN's HR and Business Analytics dual specialisation combines HR subjects with dedicated analytics subjects.
If pan-India HR brand recognition is the priority, Amity Online MBA HRM or NMIMS HRM carry stronger national recognition.
